Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The professional wrestling event and competition known as the Lucha Libre World Cup was orchestrated by the Mexican professional wrestling organization, Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide (AAA). This particular tournament unfolded on March 19, 2023, at the Estadio de Béisbol Charros de Jalisco, situated in Zapopan, a city in close proximity to Guadalajara, Mexico. The 2023 iteration of this contest uniquely presented teams composed of three individuals, a format known as trios within the Lucha Libre sphere; this configuration marked a divergence from the preceding event, which traditionally showcased two-person tag teams. The tournament highlighted various teams comprising wrestlers hailing from a multitude of international promotions. These included Nación Lucha Libre (NLL) from Mexico, All Elite Wrestling (AEW), Impact Wrestling (Impact), and the National Wrestling Alliance (NWA) from America, Dragon Gate and Oz Academy (Oz) from Japan, and Qatar Pro Wrestling (QPW). The men's division of the tournament saw Team Mexico, consisting of Taurus, Pentagón Jr., and, emerge victorious.
B. The Lucha Libre World Cup was a professional wrestling event and tournament organized by Mexican professional wrestling promotion Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide (AAA). The tournament took place on March 19, 2023 at Estadio de Béisbol Charros de Jalisco in Zapopan, near Guadalajara, Mexico. The 2023 edition of the tournament featured three-person teams, referred to as trios in Lucha Libre; this differed from the previous edition of the event which featured traditional two-person tag teams. The tournament showcased teams with wrestlers from numerous international promotions including Mexico's Nación Lucha Libre (NLL), America's All Elite Wrestling (AEW), Impact Wrestling (Impact), and the National Wrestling Alliance (NWA), Japan's Dragon Gate and Oz Academy (Oz), and Qatar Pro Wrestling (QPW).
